  "claims": [
    "Folic acid is essential to preventing birth defects, and food is the best way to get folic acid into women’s diets before they become pregnant.",
    "The bill AB 1888 ensures that the State prioritizes victims of labor trafficking through more efficient and comprehensive enforcement of existing labor trafficking laws.",
